items.title: Jeff Bezos's Prometheus Raises $12B to Build an 'Artificial General Engineer' for the Physical World
items.summary: Jeff Bezos's new venture, Prometheus, has secured an astounding $12 billion in funding to develop an "artificial general engineer" focused on real-world physical applications.

items.title: OpenAI to Acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI announced its acquisition of Ona, signaling a strategic move to integrate new capabilities or talent into its AI ecosystem.

items.title: Redesign Mixture-of-Experts Routers with Manifold Power Iteration
items.summary: New research proposes redesigning Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) routers using Manifold Power Iteration to potentially enhance the efficiency and performance of large language models.

items.title: Toward Generalist Autonomous Research via Hypothesis-Tree Refinement
items.summary: This paper explores a novel approach to achieving generalist autonomous research by refining hypothesis trees, pushing the boundaries of AI's scientific discovery capabilities.

items.title: Agentic Environment Engineering for Large Language Models: A Survey
items.summary: This survey provides a comprehensive overview of agentic environment engineering for large language models, covering modeling, synthesis, evaluation, and application to guide future research.

items.title: Claw-SWE-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating OpenClaw-style Agent Harnesses on Coding Tasks
items.summary: A new benchmark, Claw-SWE-Bench, has been introduced to rigorously evaluate OpenClaw-style AI agent harnesses on complex coding tasks, aiming to standardize performance measurement.

items.title: Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distributions
items.summary: New research proposes moving beyond simple scalar rewards in reinforcement learning by internalizing reasoning into score distributions, aiming for more sophisticated agent training.

items.title: Supporting Europe’s Work in Ensuring a Trustworthy AI Ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI reiterates its commitment to supporting Europe's efforts in establishing a trustworthy AI ecosystem, highlighting collaboration on ethical guidelines and regulatory frameworks.

items.title: HazelJS 1.0.0: Stable Release of the AI-Native TypeScript Framework
items.summary: HazelJS has announced the stable 1.0.0 release of its AI-native TypeScript framework, offering developers a robust toolset for building AI applications.

items.title: Grammar-Constrained Decoding Can Jailbreak LLMs into Generating Malicious Code
items.summary: Researchers demonstrate that grammar-constrained decoding methods can be exploited to jailbreak large language models, compelling them to generate malicious code.

items.title: DeNovoSWE: Scaling Long-Horizon Environments for Generating Entire Repositories from Scratch
items.summary: DeNovoSWE introduces a method for scaling long-horizon environments, enabling AI agents to generate entire software repositories from scratch, pushing the boundaries of autonomous software engineering.

items.title: My Daughter Asked if Developers Used to Write Code by Hand, but it Was the Follow-Up Question That Surprised Me.
items.summary: A Google AI blog post reflects on a child's insightful questions about the evolution of coding, highlighting the rapid advancements and future implications of AI in software development.

items.title: Google ADK Security: 5 Layers That Defend AI Agents From Prompt Injection
items.summary: Google details five layers of security within its AI Development Kit (ADK) designed to protect AI agents from prompt injection attacks, enhancing the robustness of AI applications.

items.title: How an Astrophysicist Uses Codex to Help Simulate Black Holes
items.summary: An astrophysicist shares insights into how OpenAI's Codex is being utilized to assist in complex simulations of black holes, demonstrating AI's utility in advanced scientific research.

items.title: chromiumfish: A Stealth Chromium Build with a Drop-in Playwright Harness for Python and Node
items.summary: Chromiumfish offers a stealthy Chromium build integrated with a Playwright harness, providing developers with a powerful tool for automated browser testing and scraping in Python and Node.js.
